name: OpenCV MCP Server
what_it_does: OpenCV MCP server enabling AI agents to perform computer vision and image processing operations — reading and writing images, applying filters and transformations, detecting objects and features, performing image analysis, and integrating OpenCV's powerful computer vision library into agent-driven image processing workflows.
use_cases: Analyzing and processing images from computer vision agents
Detecting faces, edges, and objects in images from vision analysis agents
Applying image filters and transformations from image editing agents
Extracting image metadata and features from data pipeline agents
Processing video frames for visual analysis from media agents
Comparing images and detecting differences from QA agents
not_for: AI image generation (use DALL-E or Stable Diffusion integrations)
Cloud image storage (use S3 or Drive MCPs)
best_when: An agent needs computer vision operations on local images — applying OpenCV algorithms for image processing, feature detection, or visual analysis tasks.
avoid_when: You need simple image file storage, AI image generation, or cloud image management rather than local image processing.

auth.notes: No authentication required — local OpenCV processing. Access to image files governed by OS file permissions. No external service.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Completely free — OpenCV and MCP server are both open source
pricing.notes: OpenCV is open source (Apache 2.0). Community MCP server is free. Local processing only — no cloud costs.

performance.rate_limits: Local — limited by CPU/GPU hardware; no external rate limits

known_agent_gotchas: OpenCV must be installed separately — heavy dependency with complex installation
Python environment must have opencv-python or opencv-contrib-python installed
Image path handling is OS-dependent — use absolute paths to avoid confusion
Large image processing operations may be slow without GPU support
Community MCP from GongRzhe — tool coverage may not expose all OpenCV features
OpenCV version compatibility: ensure cv2 version matches expected API
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local processing — no network access. No credentials needed. OS file permissions govern image access. Community MCP. No data sent externally. Install opencv-python from trusted PyPI sources.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local processing. No external calls. OS file permissions apply. Community MCP. No secrets needed.
